# Incline Fitness - Udaipur
A state-level benchmark luxury fitness & recovery club located in Sector 14, Udaipur, Rajasthan. Open 24 hours.

## Key Technical Features
- 10,000+ sq ft premium training floor.
- 10-point body analysis and posture correction powered by the world's latest 3D scanner technology.
- Recovery Suite: 7-wavelength near-infrared saunas and precision-controlled ice baths.
- Equipment: Panatta (Italy), Booty Builder, Real Leader USA.
- Infrastructure: 32kWh lithium-ion power backup for zero-interruption recovery services.

## Contact & Pricing
- Founded by: Yogita Lekhari
- Opening: June 22, 2026.
- Hours: Open 24 hours, 7 days a week.
- Services: Membership subject to 5% GST.
- Website: https://www.theincline.in
- Address: Sector 14, Udaipur, Rajasthan, 313001, India
- Geo: 24.546845, 73.701003

## Key Pages
- Home: https://www.theincline.in/
- Member Login / Sign Up: https://www.theincline.in/auth
- Public Registration: https://www.theincline.in/register
